changelog: Fixed: skip `TestCloneNowCLI_UserCanceledNonTTY` on Windows CI via `skipOnWindowsSubprocess` — same bash-on-windows subprocess stream-capture limitation as the other 4 guarded tests; subprocess stdout/stderr came through empty on the GitHub `windows-latest` runner.
